Special Student

Special students can attend the specific courses determined by Kadir Has University in order to improve their knowledge and skills, provided they are registered at another higher education institution, and if accepted, they can participate under the status of “

special student

”.

General Information

At Kadir Has University, the Faculty of Law and the Department of Theatre offer 30% of their courses in English, while other departments offer 100% of their courses in English.

To apply for the status of a special student, it is required to get approval from the relevant faculty’s board at the registered university or to submit an official document written by the relevant dean’s office on behalf of the student.

Those who take courses as special students are not considered as students of Kadir Has University and cannot benefit from student rights. However, they are expected to follow the regulations and rules of Kadir Has University.

Gaining this status does not mean acceptance to a diploma program. The transcripts of the special students who successfully complete their courses are sent to their registered university.

Special student admission is only valid for one semester. Those who wish to take courses in the upcoming semesters must reapply.

Undergraduate students can only benefit from special student status for a maximum of two semesters in total.

Applications are accepted online via the link:

https://ozelogrenci.khas.edu.tr/

You can reach the undergraduate course plans and contents of Kadir Has University through the link:

https://bologna.khas.edu.tr/lisans

Special student registration must be completed within the course registration period specified in the

academic calendar

.

Those who register as special students are issued a student ID card by the university.

Click here for Special Student Application Form.

Documents Needed for Application

Application Form

Identity Document: Turkish ID card / Blue card / Photocopy of passport (both sides on a single page)

Student Certificate: It must be obtained from the university you are registered at.

Board Decision: An official letter from the relevant faculty of the university you are registered at, stating that they permit you to take courses as a special student.

One photograph.

Students registered in programs where the language of instruction is Turkish must provide documentation proving that their foreign language proficiency is sufficient in order to take courses from programs where the language of instruction is a foreign language.

Click here for Directive on School of Foreign Languages English Preparatory Program.

Fees and Payments

Special students pay the tuition fee determined by the Board of Trustees based on the ECTS credits of the courses they take. Once the payment is made, no fee refund is possible. In the event that the courses you registered for are not offered, the fee paid for these courses will be refunded by the Directorate of Financial Control.

2025-2026 Academic Year – Special Student Fee Chart per ECTS Credit (Including VAT)

Fall/Spring Semester

13.400,00 TL

International Undergraduate Students

(Including Turkish students registered under international student status)

300,00 USD

* You can access detailed information about Summer School at

https://www.khas.edu.tr/en/summer-school/

.

If your application is accepted, the registration and course registration processes will be carried out by the Directorate of Student Affairs. The payment must be completed and approval from the Directorate of Financial Control must be obtained.

If the payment is not made within the specified time, your course registration is cancelled.

For applications and detailed information, you can reach us at

[email protected]

.
